calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2004 Text Ruling

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Janet Pond
Appearances:
Ronald Winchell, Esq. for Petitioner: Keo Lam present as guardian ad litem for Andrew Lam, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:

Compromise: $7,500.00

Medical expenses of $1,073.00
Reimbursement of legal/Costs to attorney $460.85
Attorney's fees: $1,875.00

A net balance of $4,091.15 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Wells Fargo Bank, Post & Montgomery Branch, San Francisco #6037-329398
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
If the medical bill is compromised, any savings from said bill is to be deposited into the trust account.
Order signed in open court.
